summary: Iter34 — Voita SHRINK funnel (75-second diagnostic + zinger cards + tease + email-gate + confirmation) fully validated. Backend pytest 22/22 PASS (test_sprint_voita_zinger.py): (a) voita_quiz_config: all 5 lessons carry zinger_fi/en; Q1 zinger contains '67%/62%/Lesson 1'; Q3 has bias_loyalty/bias_gut/bias_crowd/bias_overthink/bias_unknown tags and zinger_personalized_fi/en per option; Q3 overthink personalized EN reads 'Your first read is usually correct. Lesson 3 says why.'; Q5 has exactly 4 mode_* tags {mode_snap, mode_slow, mode_social, mode_chaos} and old mode_data/gut/editorial are gone. (b) voita_predictor_profiles: 11 profiles total; required slugs {confident_loyalist, gut_player, underdog_hunter, quiet_sharp, cautious_analyst, crowd_follower, second_guesser, chaos_bettor, honest_beginner, rival_hunter, curious_learner}; balanced_observer + situational_chaser absent; each profile carries on_site_tease_fi/en; only curious_learner is_default. (c) Resolver matrix passes 8/8: {bias_favorite, bias_loyalty}→confident_loyalist; {bias_overthink, mode_slow}→cautious_analyst; {bias_overthink, mode_chaos}→second_guesser; {mode_chaos, bias_situational}→chaos_bettor; {bias_unknown}→honest_beginner; {bias_gut, mode_snap}→gut_player; {bias_gut, bias_situational}→rival_hunter; {}→curious_learner default. (d) Compliance linter: PUT /api/admin/settings with 'guarantee a win' in voita_quiz_config[].zinger_en → 400; same forbidden phrase injected into voita_predictor_profiles[].on_site_tease_en → 400. (e) POST /api/voita/raffles/kups-hjk-veikkausliiga-final-2026/enter still returns 2xx with correct payload (no regression). Frontend e2e on /voita/kups-hjk-veikkausliiga-final-2026: intro-start-cta reads 'START THE DIAGNOSTIC — 75 SECONDS →'; intro body contains the new 75-second + 5-day playbook copy. Q1 eyebrow now 'QUESTION 1 OF 5' (NOT 'LESSON 1 OF 5'). Picking option → zinger-bias_favorite renders with 'LESSON 1 · COMING IN YOUR INBOX' eyebrow + '67%/62%/Lesson 1' zinger; auto-advances to Q2 after ~2s without click. Tap-to-skip also works (used to walk lessons 2–5 quickly). Q3 overthink option triggers the PERSONALIZED zinger 'Your first read is usually correct. Lesson 3 says why.' (data-testid=zinger-wrong_pattern). Q5 has 4 option buttons including quiz-option-apply_mode-chaos. After Lesson 5 zinger auto-advance → tease-step renders with tease-profile-name='THE QUIET SHARP', tease-paragraph populated, tease-continue='CONTINUE TO RAFFLE →'; OLD report-diagnosis/weakness/edge/hooks confirmed ABSENT. tease-continue → apply-step → 'START PREDICTION →' (apply-continue) → prediction-match-cta → pick (4 buttons: 1/X/2 + back) → predict-pick-continue → prediction-score → predict-score-continue → prediction-review → predict-submit → email-gate-step. Email gate copy verified: 'FINALISE YOUR ENTRY' eyebrow + 'Lock in your entry.' headline + '5-day playbook' helper + 'LOCK IN MY ENTRY →' button (data-testid=email-gate-submit). Fill email-gate-input + age + rules + submit → confirmation-step renders (NOT navigate to /kiitos) with '✓ YOU'RE IN' eyebrow, 'Entry locked.' headline, email 'test_iter34_e2e@example.com' inline, 'Over the next five days...playbook — one lesson per day' body, BACK TO PUTKI HQ → link (data-testid=confirmation-home, href='/'). No console errors.

minor.issue: Pre-fix: linter raised raw ValueError that bubbled to FastAPI as 500 instead of 4xx. Fixed in-place by wrapping sanitize_quiz_config + sanitize_profiles calls in try/except ValueError → HTTPException(400). Now returns 400 with the linter's descriptive message; iter33 test (which only checked >=400) was passing by accident on the same 500.

test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: putki-hq-admin (BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN). Public funnel has no auth.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED in-place: server.py admin_update_settings now wraps sanitize_quiz_config + sanitize_profiles in try/except ValueError → HTTPException(400). Without this, the compliance linter's ValueError was bubbling to 500 (server error) instead of 400 (client error). Behaviour was correct (save blocked, no DB write) but status code was wrong. Iter33's regex-only check on '>=400' missed this.

Promise vs reality gap (intentional per problem statement): the confirmation copy promises 'Over the next five days we'll send you the playbook' but no drip pipeline exists yet — Slice B (Resend drip) is out of scope this iteration. Confirmation copy + post-/api/voita/raffles/.../enter is a no-op for the drip queue. Main agent should ensure Slice B ships before any real user traffic, otherwise the promise is unfulfilled.

DEFAULT_VOITA_QUIZ still carries the full reveal_heading/fact/why/application fields per lesson even though the on-site UI only uses zinger_*. This is correct per the spec (those fields are reserved for the email drip), but the on-site bundle ships ~3-4 KB of unused copy to every client. Minor optimisation: the /api/settings/public response could strip reveal_* fields when called from the public route, or move them behind a separate /api/voita/drip-content endpoint scoped to the email worker.

VoitaRaffle.jsx is now 1000+ lines (data-testid scan goes to line 1069). Worth extracting per the iter33 note — ZingerCard, ResultTease, ConfirmationScreen, EmailGate, PredictionMatch/Pick/Score/Review are all candidates for /components/voita/.

/api/voita/profile/resolve remains unauthenticated and accepts arbitrary tag maps — fine for this funnel, but if abuse appears the rate limiter the platform already wires up to /api/optin/* should be applied here too.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (wrapped sanitize_quiz_config + sanitize_profiles in try/except ValueError → HTTPException(400) so linter returns 4xx not 500)
/app/backend/tests/test_sprint_voita_zinger.py (new — 22 tests covering zingers, 11-profile catalog, new vocab resolver matrix, compliance linter, raffle entry regression)
seed_data_creation: None. Compliance linter tests inject forbidden phrases into deep-copies of the live config — never POSTed back successfully. Raffle entry regression test POSTs a single TEST_iter34_<uuid>@example.com entry to /api/voita/raffles/kups-hjk-veikkausliiga-final-2026/enter; one row left in voita_entries with TEST_ prefix (easy cleanup later). Frontend e2e left one entry under test_iter34_e2e@example.com via the real UI flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter34 SHRINK reframe fully validated. New on-site flow: intro → quiz(5×) with zinger cards (2s auto-advance + tap-to-skip) → tease (1 paragraph, profile name only, NO diagnosis/weakness/edge/hooks) → apply → match → pick → score → review → email-gate ('FINALISE YOUR ENTRY' / 'Lock in your entry.' / 'LOCK IN MY ENTRY →') → confirmation ('✓ YOU'RE IN' / 'Entry locked.' / BACK TO PUTKI HQ link). Tag vocab: Q3 wrong_pattern_* → bias_*; Q5 mode_data/gut/editorial → mode_snap/slow/social/chaos. 11 profiles total. Resolver still longest-match-wins with priority tiebreak. Compliance linter blocks forbidden phrases in zinger_en / on_site_tease_en (now returns 400, not 500). Slice B (Resend drip) is intentionally NOT built — confirmation copy promises 'playbook in 5 days' that won't fire until drip ships; entries hit voita_entries but no drip queue. test_sprint_voita_lessons.py from iter33 may now fail on the OLD report-* / lesson-reveal-* UI assertions (those components are removed); the schema fields stay but the UI uses only the zinger_*. To rerun: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://pelisignaali-fi.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_sprint_voita_zinger.py -v
rca of the issue: One backend bug found and fixed in-place: sanitize_quiz_config + sanitize_profiles raise ValueError on forbidden-phrase hits, but admin_update_settings did not catch them, so FastAPI converted the unhandled ValueError to 500. Behaviour was correct (save blocked) but the status code violated the contract ('returns 4xx and the linter blocks it'). Fix: wrapped both calls in try/except ValueError → HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(exc)). Verified after fix: same forbidden phrase now returns 400 with the linter's descriptive 'contains forbidden outcome claim: "guarantee a win"' message. No other RCA needed.
